examples.title: Virtual Function Basics
examples.description: Demonstrates basic virtual function usage for runtime polymorphism
examples.explanation: Base pointer to Derived object calls derived version through vtable. Virtual destructor ensures proper cleanup.

examples.title: Pure Virtual Function and Abstract Class
examples.description: Shows abstract class implementation using pure virtual functions
examples.explanation: Shape is abstract with pure virtual functions. Circle provides implementations and can be instantiated.

examples.title: Virtual Destructor Demonstration
examples.description: Shows importance of virtual destructor for proper cleanup
examples.explanation: Without virtual destructor, derived portion is not cleaned up causing memory leak.

examples.title: Virtual Destructor - Correct Version
examples.explanation: Virtual destructor ensures both derived and base destructors are called in correct order.

examples.title: Override and Final Specifiers
examples.description: Demonstrates C++11 override and final specifiers
examples.explanation: final prevents overriding func1 and inheriting FinalClass. override ensures compile-time error if signature doesn't match.

examples.title: Object Slicing Problem and Solution
examples.description: Demonstrates slicing and prevention using pointers/references
examples.explanation: Assigning derived to base by value causes slicing. Using pointers or references preserves polymorphism.
